summary: Approved current, human-confirmed decisions: primary goal is enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal (ART-CHARTER). Use EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 (ART-DATA). Primary metric is macro AUROC with protein family as the statistical unit (ART-METRIC). Formal seeds are 7, 21, 42 (ART-SEEDS). Baseline is ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee (ART-BASELINE). Governance sets 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100, protects data/raw, and stops when the budget is exhausted or after more than 2 NaN failures (ART-GOVERNANCE). No rejected or deprecated alternatives are supplied.
